nodes.name: 西開普省
nodes.summary: 西開普省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括Cape spurfowl、Karoo korhaan、Damara tern等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Cape wagtail
nodes.summary: Cape wagtail（Cape wagtail，学名 Motacilla capensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: capensis on the South African south coast]] Cape wagtails are found in eastern and southern Africa from Uganda, the eastern DRCongo and Kenya, through Zambia and Angola to southern Africa, south to the Western Cape and the Cape of Good Hope. Cape wagtails can be found in almost any habitat that has open ground adjacent to water, and also along the rocky coastline, in farms, villages, cultivated land, parks, gardens and urban centres. In east Africa it is generally found above in altitude
